turns.content:
## Runtime feature ownership

### Why this must be decided now

The editor and runtime both need the same feature snapshot, so ownership must be fixed before either path changes.

### Structure tree

```text
FeatureCoordinator
|- IFeatureSource
|  `- SavedFeatureSource
`- RuntimeRenderer
```

### Illustrative code

```csharp
// Illustrative contract, not final file placement.
public interface IFeatureSource
{
    FeatureSnapshot Read();
}
```

### Recommended: A - coordinator owns lifecycle

Keep construction and cleanup in FeatureCoordinator while consumers depend only on IFeatureSource.

### Alternative: B - renderer owns source

This reduces one component but couples rendering to persistence.

### Your decision

Use A, or choose B?
